heading: Activate a Subscription
body:
> **Note:** You must be an [Organization Owner](<Organization Owner>)
> or [Organization Billing Admin](<Organization Billing Admin>) to activate a subscription.

When you purchase a subscription from
[MongoDB Sales](https://www.mongodb.com/company/contact?tck=docs),
MongoDB sends you an email containing an activation code.
To apply this subscription to your Atlas organization:

With an active subscription, Atlas displays a confirmation icon
and message in the **Payment Method** card on the right side of
the page.

> **Note:** 
>
> - If you do not add your subscription activation code within the
>   first 30 days of use, MongoDB charges the credit card associated
>   with the account. Credit card charges are non-refundable.
>
> - If you lose your activation code,
>   [MongoDB Support](request-support).
